hero_intro: Izcalli is a San Diego nonprofit serving Chicana/o and Indigenous communities through cultural arts, education, and healing circles — for more than 30 years.
mission_lead: The mission of Izcalli is to transform the lives of Chicana/o and Indigenous communities by promoting cultural consciousness through the arts, education, and community dialogue.

stats.label: people engage with Izcalli each year
young people reached through our circles

event_dates: July 31 – August 2, 2026 · Manzanita Reservation, Kumeyaay land
